scripts.test:h25a-lora-image: vitest run frontend/lib/path4-image-transfer.test.ts frontend/lib/lora-sarq-wire.test.ts frontend/lib/lora-sarq-parser.test.ts frontend/lib/lora-sarq-reassembly.test.ts frontend/features/send/lora-image-morg-seg-v1-policy.test.ts frontend/features/send/lora-image-morg-seg-v1-send.test.ts
scripts.test:h15-direct-submit: vitest run frontend/lib/direct-iota-plain-submit.test.ts frontend/lib/direct-iota-error-messages.test.ts frontend/lib/direct-iota-chain-context.test.ts frontend/lib/direct-iota-inbox-fetch.test.ts frontend/lib/autarky-status-line.test.ts frontend/lib/composer-encryption-context-hint.test.ts frontend/lib/chunk-load-error.test.ts frontend/lib/connected-peers-snapshot.test.ts frontend/lib/direct-iota-peering.test.ts frontend/lib/direct-iota-handshake-fetch.test.ts frontend/lib/direct-iota-handshake-submit.test.ts frontend/lib/direct-iota-connect.test.ts frontend/lib/handshake-send-hybrid.test.ts frontend/lib/connect-hybrid.test.ts frontend/lib/purge-handshake-hybrid.test.ts frontend/lib/purge-message-hybrid.test.ts frontend/lib/mailbox-purge-routing.test.ts frontend/lib/peering-qr.test.ts frontend/lib/install-qr.test.ts frontend/lib/path4-image-transfer.test.ts frontend/features/send/lora-image-morg-seg-v1-policy.test.ts frontend/features/send/lora-image-morg-seg-v1-send.test.ts frontend/lib/mailbox-send-hybrid.test.ts frontend/components/chat-view-direct-iota-path-badge.test.tsx ../packages/morgendrot-core/src/iota/handshake-offers-rpc.test.ts ../packages/morgendrot-core/src/iota/handshake-ecdh-txb.test.ts ../packages/morgendrot-core/src/iota/purge-handshake-txb.test.ts ../packages/morgendrot-core/src/iota/messaging-events-inbox-rpc.test.ts ../packages/morgendrot-core/src/iota/purge-message-txb.test.ts ../packages/morgendrot-core/src/iota/purge-team-broadcast-txb.test.ts
scripts.build:capacitor-web: set CAPACITOR_EXPORT=1&& set NEXT_PUBLIC_MORG_PRODUCT=messenger&& next build
scripts.apk:debug:build: npm run build:capacitor-web && npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
